description: Backend service keeps restarting every 20 minutes. Kubernetes shows OOMKilled status.
logs:
2026-03-12 09:00:00 INFO Service started OK
2026-03-12 09:15:32 WARN Heap usage at 78% (3.1GB/4GB)
2026-03-12 09:18:44 WARN Heap usage at 92% (3.7GB/4GB)
2026-03-12 09:20:01 ERROR OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
2026-03-12 09:20:01 FATAL JVM terminated: OOM
2026-03-12 09:20:15 INFO Service restarting (attempt 1)
expected_hypothesis: Memory leak causing OOM — heap growth without GC reclaim
